titleStmt.title: SII 39.49: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 49. (A.R. No. 49 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1459 (1536-37 A.D.)

summary.p: Built in at the right side. Records the re-settlement of Tandirimār at this place permanently. Some incentive was made in the form of tax concession for all the years by the temple trustees. Signatories Narasinghabrahmādarāyar, Ālāasundara bhaṭṭar, Tiyam-Uyyanerikāṭṭinār etc., are mentioned in the inscription. This seems to be related to the above inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhama[ stū cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 9- l me cellā
tuṉmuki varuṣam paṅkūṉi mātam 10 § puṟamalaināṭṭu tiru ko
Āṇṭanayiṉār koyil śrī paṇṭārak kāriya
varom meṟpaṭiyūr tantirimāṟku Icaivapāṭu
kkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ Iṟuttu Ivakāttukka
lakuṭiyaṉ pala Iṭattilum citaṟappokai Iṉi
yiṉār kuṭiyākap pala Iṭattilum Iruntu vanteṟiṉa
Iñke muṉṉukkup pokāmal Irunta kuṭikkum nām
mutalāka Eṟku mūṉṟu paṇamum kaiylai Irukku Oṉ
paṇamum puṟakkuṭi 7 10 5kku Iraṇṭu paṇamum paruvaka
Oru paṇamum Āka varucantoṟum Iṟuttu nayiṉāṟku Uṇṭa
ḻiyaṅkaḷuñ ceytu cukattile Irukka kaṭavaka mākavu
ntom runtāl Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyāṭ ṭāṉ
ḷuṭi veṇṭiṉa kuṭikku Aṭaittuk koḷḷakkaṭavomākavu
cammatittuk kalliluñ cempiluñ veṭṭik kuṭuttom I
yūr tantirimāṟku ciṟipaṇṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭavarom
ku naraciṅkapiramātarāyar Eḻuttu Ālāla cuntarapaṭṭar �
cuntarapāṇṭiyap piramātārāyar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
tiyam Uyya neṟi kāṭṭiṉār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pe
ṉam Eḻutiṉeṉ koyil kaṇakku muṉṉaik kuṭi
yāṉāṉa tiruvoṟṟacāmam Aḻakiyarāṉa tiruñāṉa campā
ḻār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
